name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: 24 HOUR GOAL: $1 million
body:
We can't get outraised | Peter --

Some days, this job is more straightforward than others. And today is one of the more straightforward days -- when I crunch numbers, set fundraising targets, and have to be the bad guy who says we aren’t hitting our critical goals.

We’re fewer than 90 days from Election Day, Peter. We know exactly how much money we need to raise every single day between now and then to run the kind of campaign that will win. Here’s the spoiler for you: It’s a lot.

Today, August 12th, this team has to raise $1 million online. One million dollars. That’s our goal to make sure we stay on pace with Donald Trump and to keep the lights on and doors open in field offices across the country. And unlike Trump, who can write himself a check for whatever he needs, we're relying on the generosity of more than 2 million donors.

**[We only have until midnight -- are you in?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjYyMjc2NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyMTg4MDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Now’s the time to step up. We need Hillary in the White House. But it’s going to take all of us to get her there.

**We’re the good guys, Peter. Let’s show the world we mean it with $1 right now -- and when you do, we’ll send you a free sticker as a thank you:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjYyMjc2NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyMTg4MDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Dennis

Dennis Cheng
National Finance Director
Hillary for America

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to help us reach our $1,000,000 goal by midnight:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjYyMjc2NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyMTg4MDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

**** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjYyMjc2NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyMTg4MDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjYyMjc2NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyMTg4MDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Opening this email on your iPhone? [Click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjYyMjc2NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyMTg4MDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to get our Hillary 2016 mobile app now. Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjYyMjc2NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyMTg4MDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjYyMjc2NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyMTg4MDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjYyMjc2NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyMTg4MDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjYyMjc2NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyMTg4MDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjYyMjc2NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyMTg4MDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjYyMjc2NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyMTg4MDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjYyMjc2NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyMTg4MDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYyMjc2NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyMTg4MDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Rob Portman
subject: On the road!
body:
| Peter -- We just kicked off our "Moving Ohio Forward" Summer RV Tour in Terrace Park and now we are headed to Centerville!

Today, we're holding our third Super Saturday day of grassroots action. Jane and I are traveling across Ohio and meeting with volunteers and interns as we work to surpass our goal of contacting 100,000 voters in a single day!

Our grassroots team is one of the reasons we will win in November. Since May of last year, our incredible volunteers and interns have contacted more than 3.1 million targeted voters and we're just getting started. We recently received the endorsements of the Teamsters, the Ohio Fraternal Order of Police, the International Union of Operating Engineers Local 18 and the United Mine Workers of America because they know I am the candidate in this race fighting for Ohio workers and families!

National Democrats have said Ohio is their #1 target — that's why they're already spending $32,000,000 on false ads attacking me. But we won't be outworked.

Today is the first day of our "Moving Ohio Forward" Summer RV Tour with 50 stops in 30 counties across 3,500 miles — so be on the lookout for us soon! All best,

Rob Portman [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ss_aug_1&n=1)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ss_aug_1&n=2)[

](https://www.robportman.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ss_aug_1&n=3)

What does Republican Bill Bryant have in common with Donald Trump? A lot:
* They are staunchly opposed to raising the minimum wage
* They refuse to support any common sense gun safety reforms
* And they are both funded by Bill Doddridge, a California millionaire

Bill Bryant doesn't like to talk about Donald Trump, but he's more than happy to have his campaign funded by the guy behind Trump's super PAC.
It's time to fight back against Bryant, against a group of ultra-wealthy Republicans who think they can buy this election.
[**Rush a donation of $5 to Governor Inslee 's campaign today as we fight back!**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTM1MTIwNQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=OTgxMDI3ODQxS0&mt=2&rj=OTgxMDI3ODQxS0&rt=0)

If the same thing happens this fall, we could be in real trouble. This election could be at a tipping point if Jay can't count on you to respond.

name: John Gregg
subject: TAKE THE POLL: Too much testing?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
body:
Are you tired of all the testing? And teaching devoted to the tests? Tell me where you stand.
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6195494474332370944/4762416468837402624?utm_campaign=adv_edupol_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&ms=em16160812advedupolgqfuljg&refcode=em16160812advedupolgqfuljg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)
---
Peter, Are you tired of all the testing? And teaching devoted to the tests? Our students are. Kids across Indiana are starting their new school years, and we already know that too much of their time in the classroom will be devoted to passing a standardized test -- and not preparing them for the future. My opponent thinks we're on the right track -- but I think our kids deserve better. **[Do you believe students deserve an education that prepares them for the real world -- not just high-stakes tests? Let me know where you stand.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6195494474332370944/4762416468837402624?utm_campaign=adv_edupol_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&ms=em16160812advedupolgqfuljg&refcode=em16160812advedupolgqfuljg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6195494474332370944/4762416468837402624?utm_campaign=adv_edupol_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&ms=em16160812advedupolgqfuljg&refcode=em16160812advedupolgqfuljg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=) My opponent has committed to keeping our state on the same track as Governor Pence -- which would lead to more teacher shortages, failing grades for students and schools, and inadequate access to preschool. Christina Hale and I have a plan to strengthen our schools, support teachers, pay for pre-Kindergarten education, and make college more affordable. And we'll work with State Superintendent of Public Instruction Glenda Ritz to put our students before politics. But to strengthen our schools, I believe we need to fix the testing mess. And I need your help to show state legislators that it's a priority. **[If you agree that there's too much teaching to the test in Indiana, take the poll now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6195494474332370944/4762416468837402624?utm_campaign=adv_edupol_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&ms=em16160812advedupolgqfuljg&refcode=em16160812advedupolgqfuljg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)** Thanks for sharing your voice, John
| | [**Share your answer ->**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6195494474332370944/4762416468837402624?utm_campaign=adv_edupol_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&ms=em16160812advedupolgqfuljg&refcode=em16160812advedupolgqfuljg&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Let’s meet up?
body:
Add your name right now. | Peter --

Since I joined the ticket last month, I've been campaigning in more than 15 states and meeting some incredible people. Everywhere I go, I'm impressed by how supporters just like you are putting in the long hours and doing whatever it takes to elect Hillary the next President of the United States.

I learn so much from those one-on-one interactions -- getting to know you is important to me.

**[That’s why I’m so excited about this: Today, if you add your name, you'll be entered for the chance to be flown out with one of your friends to meet me on the campaign trail.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYyMzA1OTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyMjkwMDYzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

** We can talk about anything you would like -- the Olympics, your family, music, and even politics, if you want. The important thing is that I get to know you better and thank you for being part of our campaign.

We’ll cover the cost of your flight and hotel, so you don’t have to worry about a thing.

**Add your name right now for the chance to hang out with me on the campaign trail:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjYyMzA1OTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyMjkwMDYzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Tim

|

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjYyMzA1OTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODYyMjkwMDYzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

subject: FWD: New ad: 1923.
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Thanks for taking the time to watch and support our newest ad. | Friend, I wanted to make sure you saw yesterday's email announcing our new ad, "1923." The ad features a wonderful photo of my grandpa, Max, and his brand-new truck -- which he bought fresh off the line at the GM factory in Janesville. **[If you haven't yet, take a minute to watch our newest TV ad, "1923," then chip in $5 to help us keep running it across Wisconsin.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4429/1c469400/7e85ca2/3572c28/3975989157/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-1923?utm_source=ema_2016-08-13_1923_RDF_nd&refcode=ema_2016-08-13_1923_RDF_nd&utm_campaign=1923&utm_medium=ema")** My family learned about this particular photo of grandpa Max and his truck when GM put out a 75th anniversary section in the local paper. He looks so proud, standing in his apron in front of his store, right next to his brand-new GM truck. We were thrilled to see that the company had chosen this photo to honor their anniversary. Thanks for taking the time to watch and support our newest ad. I hope you like it. Sincerely, Russ Feingold \---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Cole Leystra, RussFeingold.com
Date: Fri, Aug 12, 2016
Subject: New ad: 1923 [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4429/1c469400/7e85ca2/3572c28/3975989157/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-1923?utm_source=ema_2016-08-13_1923_RDF_nd&refcode=ema_2016-08-13_1923_RDF_nd&utm_campaign=1923&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Russ's grandfather, Max, came to America in the early years of the twentieth century. He settled in Janesville -- a small town in Rock County -- to raise a family and own his own piece of the American dream. One of Max's proudest moments was buying a brand-new truck from the GM factory in Janesville in 1923. The GM plant was one of the biggest job creators in Janesville. When the plant closed down in 2008, thousands of Wisconsinites were put out of work. The story is all too familiar: Factories shut down. Workers lose their jobs. Often, those jobs are shipped overseas, leaving middle-class and working Americans high and dry. And lawmakers like Senator Ron Johnson make it even easier for corporations to cut corners by supporting a tax code that rewards companies for exporting American jobs. **[Russ knows we need an economy that works for everyone -- not just billionaires and CEOs. That's the focus of Russ's brand-new ad, "1923." Watch the ad today, then contribute $5 to help us keep it on the air.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4429/1c469400/7e85ca2/3572c28/3975989157/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-1923?utm_source=ema_2016-08-13_1923_RDF_nd&refcode=ema_2016-08-13_1923_RDF_nd&utm_campaign=1923&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4429/1c469400/7e85ca2/3572c28/3975989157/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-1923?utm_source=ema_2016-08-13_1923_RDF_nd&refcode=ema_2016-08-13_1923_RDF_nd&utm_campaign=1923&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4429/1c469400/7e85ca2/3572c29/3975989157/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-1923?utm_source=ema_2016-08-13_1923_RDF_nd&refcode=ema_2016-08-13_1923_RDF_nd&utm_campaign=1923&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")

As Russ has traveled to each of Wisconsin's 72 counties, he's met with people of all backgrounds and listened to their stories firsthand. What he's heard more than anything else is that people are having a hard time making ends meet.
We need to focus on keeping jobs in America. It's time to close the corporate loopholes that allow corporations to ship their jobs overseas.
**[If you're with Russ, watch our newest ad today, and contribute $5 to help us stay up on the air.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4429/1c469400/7e85ca2/3572c28/3975989157/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-1923?utm_source=ema_2016-08-13_1923_RDF_nd&refcode=ema_2016-08-13_1923_RDF_nd&utm_campaign=1923&utm_medium=ema")**
Thanks for tuning in,
Cole Leystra

Often, those jobs are shipped overseas, leaving middle-class and working Americans high and dry. And lawmakers like Senator Ron Johnson make it even easier for corporations to cut corners by supporting a tax code that rewards companies for exporting American jobs. "" "" Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately: | | "" | | "" | "" | | "" As Russ has traveled to each of Wisconsin's 72 counties, he's met with people of all backgrounds and listened to their stories firsthand. What he's heard more than anything else is that people are having a hard time making ends meet. We need to focus on keeping jobs in America. It's time to close the corporate loopholes that allow corporations to ship their jobs overseas. "" Thanks for tuning in, Cole Leystra Deputy Campaign Manager ""

body:
Win a chance to meet Tim Kaine | Peter --

A lot of my job is organizing trips for contest winners -- but this is the first contest where I just don’t have any of the details yet.

I can’t tell you where you’ll meet Tim Kaine, and I can’t tell you what you’ll do. Maybe you’ll meet him at a rally! Maybe you’ll grab a sandwich between campaign stops! Or maybe you’ll get together for a beer and he’ll whip out his harmonica! (Seriously.)

I just do not know -- because we're looking to find the perfect moment as we put together Tim's campaign calendar for the next few weeks. But wherever we land, I can tell you that Tim couldn't be more excited about the chance to meet one of this team's best supporters -- and we'll definitely cover your flights and hotel.

name: Rob Portman
subject: What an incredible day!
body:
| Peter, We did it — we contacted 107,906 voters in a single day! It was amazing to see the support of more than 1,500 volunteers across Ohio working hard to help us surpass 100,000 voter contacts today. Jane and I kicked our day off with many friends in Terrace Park, met with a large group of supporters in Dayton, stopped for lunch with volunteers in Columbus, stopped at Kewpee in Lima for a piece of raspberry pie, and finished up our day with a great event in Toledo. We were truly overwhelmed by the support we saw across Ohio -- thank you! We're working hard. We recently received the endorsements of the Teamsters, the Ohio Fraternal Order of Police, the International Union of Operating Engineers Local 18 and the United Mine Workers of America because they know I am the candidate in this race fighting for Ohio workers and families! Our grassroots organization has now contacted more than 3.2 million targeted voters, and we're just getting started! Thank you for everything you are doing to help our campaign. We will be all across the state as we continue our "Moving Ohio Forward" Summer RV tour with 50 stops in over 30 counties across 3,500 miles. We hope to see you soon! All best,

Rob Portman [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ss_aug_2&n=1)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ss_aug_2&n=2)[
